allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('@hugeicons/core-free-icons'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\); console.log\('Total icons:', names.length\); console.log\(names.slice\(0, 50\).join\('\\n'\)\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('@hugeicons/core-free-icons'\).then\(m => { const names = Object.keys\(m\); console.log\('Total:', names.length\); console.log\(names.slice\(0, 60\).join\('\\n'\)\); }\)")
